entity_extraction_template: Composite key columns: 'State' → 'Age_Group'. Empty cells inherit the last non-empty value from the same column above. Top-level key 'State' → State entity. Second-level key 'Age_Group' → Age_Group entity.
relation_extraction_template: Create HAS_SUB_ITEM relations between hierarchy levels: (State) -[HAS_SUB_ITEM]-> (Age_Group). Create HAS_VALUE relations from leaf entities to numeric columns: "Year", "Population_Thousands".
extraction_constraints: Detect hierarchy by sparse fill: empty cells in key columns inherit the parent value.
Top-level key 'State' defines the root entity (State).
Second-level key 'Age_Group' defines child entities (Age_Group) linked to their parent via HAS_SUB_ITEM.
Numeric columns become HAS_VALUE relations from the leaf entity.
Remarks/notes columns become metadata properties (not separate entities).
Skip rows that are entirely empty or contain only section headers.
